name: qa-claude
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin for every QA/QC engineer using AI: web/mobile automation, test-case generation, exploratory testing, review — one prefix-free plugin, install once and use across projects. Dual-purpose commands auto-detect automation vs manual mode and the right platform.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: All-in-one QA toolkit (prefix-free commands). Automation: find-elements/exploratory/plan-tests/cook/run/fix/review/push-code/merge-request (Playwright Web + Appium iOS/Android). Manual QA: generate test cases to xlsx/Sheet, analyze specs, log-bug. Shared commands auto-detect automation/manual mode + web/android/ios platform. Optional Lark/Slack/Teams/Telegram notify + Cloudflare R2 / S3 report upload.
